revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Pentade]][[ja:七十二候]][[ko:칠십이후]][[zh-classical:候]][[zh-yue:七十二候]][[zh:七十二候]]


[[File:24solarterms.png|thumb]]
'''Seventy-Two Kō (Seventy-Two Climatic Signs)''' (しちじゅうにこう) is one method devised in ancient China for expressing the {{ill|Season|en|Season|qid=Q24384|lt=Season|1=Season}}s. It subdivides the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Twenty-Four Solar Terms|1=Solar term}} into three periods of roughly five days each<ref>『年中行事事典』, p.360, 1958 (昭和33rd year ), first published May 23, edited by [[西角井正慶]], Tokyo-dō Shuppan</ref>.
Each of the seventy-two kō is named by a brief phrase that indicates changes in the weather or in flora and fauna. Some names, however, describe phenomena that are literally impossible—for example, “雉入大水為蜃” (a pheasant entering the sea becomes a large clam).
While the names of the twenty-four solar terms (二十四節気) in China remain unchanged, the names of the seventy-two kō have been altered several times. In Japan, beginning in the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, calendar scholars such as {{ill|Shibukawa Shunkai|en|Shibukawa Shunkai|qid=Q786877|lt=Shibukawa Shunkai|1=Shibukawa Shunkai}} revised the names to better suit Japan’s climate and natural environment, creating the "Honchō Seventy-Two Kō." Today the seventy-two kō mainly used are those published in the abbreviated calendar (『略本暦』) of 1874 (【明治】7). Some of the seasonal words (季語) used in {{ill|Haiku|en|Haiku|qid=Q37707|lt=Haiku|1=Haiku}} still derive from the original Chinese seventy-two kō.
== List of the Seventy-Two Kō ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Ordinal
! Solar Term !! Pentad 
|-
| 1
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Lichun|qid=Q1364685|1=Lichun}} || {{ill|East wind melts the ice|qid=Q135503058|1=East wind melts the ice}} 
|-
| 2|| {{ill|Bush warblers start singing in the mountains|qid=Q135503061|1=Bush warblers start singing in the mountains}} 
|-
| 3|| {{ill|Fish emerge from the ice|qid=Q135503065|1=Fish emerge from the ice}} 
|-
| 4
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Yushui|qid=Q1364713|1=Yushui (solar term)}} || {{ill|Rain moistens the soil|qid=Q11572249|1=Rain moistens the soil}} 
|-
| 5|| {{ill|Mist starts to linger|qid=Q135503073|1=Mist starts to linger}} 
|-
| 6|| {{ill|Grass sprouts, trees bud|qid=Q135503079|1=Grass sprouts, trees bud}} 
|-
| 7
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Jingzhe|qid=Q1306596|1=Jingzhe}} || {{ill|Hibernating insects surface|qid=Q135503084|1=Hibernating insects surface}} 
|-
| 8|| {{ill|First peach blossoms|qid=Q135503088|1=First peach blossoms}} 
|-
| 9|| {{ill|Caterpillars become butterflies|qid=Q135503094|1=Caterpillars become butterflies}} 
|-
| 10
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Chunfen|qid=Q1339268|1=Chunfen}} || {{ill|Sparrows start to nest|qid=Q135503098|1=Sparrows start to nest}} 
|-
| 11|| {{ill|First cherry blossoms|qid=Q135503105|1=First cherry blossoms}} 
|-
| 12|| {{ill|Distant thunder|qid=Q135503109|1=Distant thunder}} 
|-
| 13
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Qingming|qid=Q1680269|1=Qingming (solar term)}} || {{ill|Swallows return|qid=Q135503113|1=Swallows return}} 
|-
| 14|| {{ill|Wild geese fly north|qid=Q135503119|1=Wild geese fly north}} 
|-
| 15|| {{ill|First rainbows|qid=Q135503125|1=First rainbows}} 
|-
| 16
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Guyu|qid=Q1325032|1=Guyu}} || {{ill|First reeds sprout|qid=Q135503130|1=First reeds sprout}} 
|-
| 17|| {{ill|Last frost, rice seedlings grow|qid=Q135503135|1=Last frost, rice seedlings grow}} 
|-
| 18|| {{ill|Peonies bloom|qid=Q135503139|1=Peonies bloom}} 
|-
| 19
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Lixia|qid=Q1191007|1=Lixia}} || {{ill|Frogs start singing|qid=Q135503145|1=Frogs start singing}} 
|-
| 20|| {{ill|Worms surface|qid=Q135503151|1=Worms surface}} 
|-
| 21|| {{ill|Bamboo shoots sprout|qid=Q135503159|1=Bamboo shoots sprout}} 
|-
| 22
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Xiaoman|qid=Q1190998|1=Xiaoman}} || {{ill|Silkworms start feasting on mulberry leaves|qid=Q135503163|1=Silkworms start feasting on mulberry leaves}} 
|-
| 23|| {{ill|Safflowers bloom|qid=Q135503168|1=Safflowers bloom}} 
|-
| 24|| {{ill|Wheat ripens and is harvested|qid=Q135503172|1=Wheat ripens and is harvested}} 
|-
| 25
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Mangzhong|qid=Q1147880|1=Mangzhong}} || {{ill|Praying mantises hatch|qid=Q135503179|1=Praying mantises hatch}} 
|-
| 26|| {{ill|Rotten grass becomes fireflies|qid=Q135503185|1=Rotten grass becomes fireflies}} 
|-
| 27|| {{ill|Plums turn yellow|qid=Q135503191|1=Plums turn yellow}} 
|-
| 28
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Xiazhi|qid=Q1191013|1=Xiazhi}} || {{ill|Self-heal withers|qid=Q135503197|1=Self-heal withers}} 
|-
| 29|| {{ill|Irises bloom|qid=Q135503201|1=Irises bloom}} 
|-
| 30|| {{ill|Crow-dipper sprouts|qid=Q11406993|1=Crow-dipper sprouts}} 
|-
| 31
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Xiaoshu|qid=Q1190976|1=Xiaoshu}} || {{ill|Warm winds blow|qid=Q135503212|1=Warm winds blow}} 
|-
| 32|| {{ill|First lotus blossoms|qid=Q135503218|1=First lotus blossoms}} 
|-
| 33|| {{ill|Hawks learn to fly|qid=Q135503223|1=Hawks learn to fly}} 
|-
| 34
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Dashu|qid=Q1147765|1=Dashu (solar term)}} || {{ill|Paulownia trees produce seeds|qid=Q135503228|1=Paulownia trees produce seeds}} 
|-
| 35|| {{ill|Earth is damp, air is humid|qid=Q135503234|1=Earth is damp, air is humid}} 
|-
| 36|| {{ill|Great rains sometimes fall|qid=Q135503238|1=Great rains sometimes fall}} 
|-
| 37
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Liqiu|qid=Q1147421|1=Liqiu}} || {{ill|Cool winds blow|qid=Q135503243|1=Cool winds blow}} 
|-
| 38|| {{ill|Evening cicadas sing|qid=Q135503248|1=Evening cicadas sing}} 
|-
| 39|| {{ill|Thick fog descends|qid=Q135503253|1=Thick fog descends}} 
|-
| 40
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Chushu|qid=Q1147873|1=Chushu}} || {{ill|Cotton flowers bloom|qid=Q135503259|1=Cotton flowers bloom}} 
|-
| 41|| {{ill|Heat starts to die down|qid=Q135503264|1=Heat starts to die down}} 
|-
| 42|| {{ill|Rice ripens|qid=Q135503269|1=Rice ripens}} 
|-
| 43
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Bailu|qid=Q1191003|1=Bailu (solar term)}} || {{ill|Dew glistens white on grass|qid=Q135503273|1=Dew glistens white on grass}} 
|-
| 44|| {{ill|Wagtails sing|qid=Q135503278|1=Wagtails sing}} 
|-
| 45|| {{ill|Swallows leave|qid=Q135503284|1=Swallows leave}} 
|-
| 46
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Qiufen|qid=Q1200436|1=Qiufen}} || {{ill|Thunder ceases|qid=Q135503291|1=Thunder ceases}} 
|-
| 47|| {{ill|Insects hole up underground|qid=Q135503302|1=Insects hole up underground}} 
|-
| 48|| {{ill|Farmers drain fields|qid=Q135503312|1=Farmers drain fields}} 
|-
| 49
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Hanlu|qid=Q1193124|1=Hanlu}} || {{ill|Wild geese return|qid=Q135503321|1=Wild geese return}} 
|-
| 50|| {{ill|Chrysanthemums bloom|qid=Q135503329|1=Chrysanthemums bloom}} 
|-
| 51|| {{ill|Crickets chirp around the door|qid=Q135503338|1=Crickets chirp around the door}}

| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Shuangjiang|qid=Q1147794|1=Shuangjiang (solar term)}} || {{ill|First frost|qid=Q135503349|1=First frost}} 
|-
| 53|| {{ill|Light rains sometimes fall|qid=Q135503361|1=Light rains sometimes fall}} 
|-
| 54|| {{ill|Maple leaves and ivy turn yellow|qid=Q135503369|1=Maple leaves and ivy turn yellow}} 
|-
| 55

|-
| 56|| {{ill|Land starts to freeze|qid=Q135503385|1=Land starts to freeze}}

| 57|| {{ill|Daffodils bloom|qid=Q135503391|1=Daffodils bloom}} 
|-
| 58
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Xiaoxue|qid=Q1190980|1=Xiaoxue}} || {{ill|Rainbows hide|qid=Q135503399|1=Rainbows hide}} 
|-
| 59|| {{ill|North wind blows the leaves from the trees|qid=Q135503411|1=North wind blows the leaves from the trees}} 
|-
| 60|| {{ill|Tachibana citrus tree leaves start to turn yellow|qid=Q135503422|1=Tachibana citrus tree leaves start to turn yellow}} 
|-
| 61
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Daxue|qid=Q337815|1=Daxue (solar term)}} || {{ill|Cold sets in, winter begins|qid=Q135503432|1=Cold sets in, winter begins}} 
|-
| 62|| {{ill|Bears start hibernating in their dens|qid=Q135503439|1=Bears start hibernating in their dens}} 
|-
| 63|| {{ill|Salmon gather and swim upstream|qid=Q135503444|1=Salmon gather and swim upstream}} 
|-
| 64
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Dongzhi|qid=Q1679621|1=Dongzhi}} || {{ill|Self-heal sprouts|qid=Q135503448|1=Self-heal sprouts}} 
|-
| 65|| {{ill|Deer shed antlers|qid=Q135503455|1=Deer shed antlers}} 
|-
| 66|| {{ill|Wheat sprouts under snow|qid=Q135503461|1=Wheat sprouts under snow}} 
|-
| 67
| rowspan="3" | {{ill|Xiaohan|qid=Q1190989|1=Xiaohan}} || {{ill|Parsley flourishes|qid=Q135503465|1=Parsley flourishes}} 
|-
| 68|| {{ill|Springs thaw|qid=Q135503470|1=Springs thaw}} 
|-
| 69|| {{ill|Pheasants start to call|qid=Q135503474|1=Pheasants start to call}} 
|-
| 70

|-
| 71|| {{ill|Ice thickens on streams|qid=Q135503486|1=Ice thickens on streams}} 
|-
| 72|| {{ill|Hens start laying eggs|qid=Q135503490|1=Hens start laying eggs}}
